title: dcg-iye.5
description:
Verify and signoff 2 docs against actual code:
- docs/plans/05-testing-and-benchmarks.md (partial) → e2etest/, internal/eval/, Makefile, scripts/
- docs/plans/05-testing-and-benchmarks-test-harness.md (partial) → e2etest/

For each doc: read thoroughly, compare every type/function/test category against code, run tests, add Completion Signoff section (Complete or Partial with gaps). Report gaps via h2 send to dcg-scheduler. Commit updated docs.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 89c8574. Both docs signed off as Partial. Noted gap: TestSecuritySubcommandEvasion failures for AWS/GCP global-flag cases.
